description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is primarily composed of light-colored concrete or stucco, complemented by large glass panels and transparent railings that enclose a spacious patio area. The property includes a landscaped yard with potted plants and a paved walkway, as well as a partially covered outdoor seating area. The structure is single-story, with a rectangular footprint and an open, airy layout that emphasizes indoor-outdoor living. The main entrance is set back behind a glass fence, providing privacy while maintaining visibility. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric forms and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large glass panels, and a landscaped patio enclosed by transparent railings.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an angle highlighting the glass-enclosed patio, the flat roof, and the main entrance area.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the side of the house, emphasizing the long glass fence, the landscaped yard, and the solid concrete wall.
description_view_2: View 2 focuses on the rear and side, showing the patio, potted plants, and the transition between the outdoor and indoor spaces.
description_view_3: View 3 provides a perspective of the front entryway, the paved walkway, and the arrangement of the glass and concrete elements.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a glass gate, no steps, and a minimalist overhang; framed by concrete and glass fencing.
